root.sql:
SELECT sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id ,sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name ,FPB_ACC_GET_JV_AMT_NOT(account_id , '!op_date_1!' , '!op_date_2!' , 'DR') as dr_amount ,FPB_ACC_GET_JV_AMT_NOT(account_id , '!op_date_1!' , '!op_date_2!' , 'CR') as cr_amount
, pka_acc_glbal.fp_get_balance_gl( ( select cash_account_code from sc_acc_m_account_constant ) , '!op_date_1!'::date - 1 ) as cash_begin , pka_acc_glbal.fp_get_balance_gl( ( select cash_account_code from sc_acc_m_account_constant ) , '!op_date_2!' ) as cash_forward
FROM sc_acc_m_account_master where account_type_id = '3' and sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id not in ( select cash_account_code from sc_acc_m_account_constant ) /*WHERE*/ --and account_id = '111304' order by sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id
